creator: freebsd@rwoolley.com
text:
Fluxter 0.1.0 doesn't work with the version of Fluxbox in ports, and has been abandoned by its original author.

Mark Willson has taken it over, and updated it to 0.2.0  for fluxbox-1.1.

http://permalink.gmane.org/gmane.comp.window-managers.fluxbox.user/2913

Fix: Shar file attached, updating the port to 0.2.0

Patch attached with submission follows:
